15"]},{"c":355,"i":2,"p":["max = Settings::MAX_BATTLE_POINTS"]},{"c":655,"i":2,"p":["points = ["]},{"c":655,"i":2,"p":[" max - $player.battle_points,"]},{"c":655,"i":2,"p":[" {"id":8,"name":"Battle recorder","x":7,"y":3,"pages":[{"condition":{"switch1_valid":false,"switch1_id":1,"switch2_valid":false,"switch2_id":1,"variable_valid":false,"variable_id":1,"variable_value":0,"self_switch_valid":false,"self_switch_ch":"A"},"graphic":{"character_name":"","character_hue":0,"pattern":0,"tile_id":0,"direction":2,"opacity":255,"blend_type":0},"move_type":0,"move_speed":3,"move_frequency":3,"move_route":{"repeat":true,"skippable":false,"list":[{"code":0,"parameters":[]}]},"walk_anime":true,"step_anime":false,"direction_fix":false,"through":false,"always_on_top":false,"trigger":0,"list":[{"c":111,"i":0,"p":[6,-1,8]},{"c":102,"i":1,"p":[["Battle Factory rules","Play recorded battle","Cancel"],3]},{"c":402,"i":1,"p":[0,"Battle Factory rules"]},{"c":118,"i":2,"p":["Choices"]},{"c":101,"i":2,"p":["Which heading do you want to read?"]},{"c":102,"i":2,"p":[["Basic Rules","Swapping","Exit"],5]},{"c":402,"i":2,"p":[0,"Basic Rules"]},{"c":101,"i":3,"p":["In the Battle Factory, you fight using Pok\u00E9mon "]},{"c":401,"i":3,"p":["provided for you. You must use three Pok\u00E9mon out of "]},{"c":401,"i":3,"p":["a choice of six."]},{"c":101,"i":3,"p":["Pok\u00E9mon in later rounds will be stronger than in "]},{"c":401,"i":3,"p":["earlier rounds, both yours and your opponents\u0027."]},{"c":119,"i":3,"p":["Choices"]},{"c":0,"i":3,"p":[]},{"c":402,"i":2,"p":[1,"Swapping"]},{"c":101,"i":3,"p":["When you defeat a Trainer, you may swap one of "]},{"c":401,"i":3,"p":["your Pok\u00E9mon for one of theirs."]},{"c":101,"i":3,"p":["You can\u0027t check the details of the Trainer\u0027s Pok\u00E9mon "]},{"c":401,"i":3,"p":["before you choose one to gain in a swap. You will "]},{"c":401,"i":3,"p":["have to remember what it was like from the battle."]},{"c":101,"i":3,"p":["Your team will remain in the same order even after a "]},{"c":401,"i":3,"p":["swap. For example, if you swap away your second "]},{"c":401,"i":3,"p":["Pok\u00E9mon, the new Pok\u00E9mon will now be second."]},{"c":119,"i":3,"p":["Choices"]},{"c":0,"i":3,"p":[]},{"c":402,"i":2,"p":[2,"Exit"]},{"c":0,"i":3,"p":[]},{"c":403,"i":2,"p":[]},{"c":0,"i":3,"p":[]},{"c":404,"i":2,"p":[]},{"c":0,"i":2,"p":[]},{"c":402,"i":1,"p":[1,"Play recorded battle"]},{"c":111,"i":2,"p":[12,"$PokemonGlobal.lastbattle != nil"]},{"c":355,"i":3,"p":["pbPlayLastBattle"]},{"c":0,"i":3,"p":[]},{"c":411,"i":2,"p":[]},{"c":101,"i":3,"p":["There is no battle recorded."]},{"c":0,"i":3,"p":[]},{"c":412,"i":2,"p":[]},{"c":0,"i":2,"p":[]},{"c":402,"i":1,"p":[2,"Cancel"]},{"c":0,"i":2,"p":[]},{"c":404,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":412,"i":0,"p":[]},{"c":0,"i":0,"p":[]}]}]}
